[D1] (3:46-5:2) TS377084: This arrow function block only returns an expression and can use a concise body. effect(unnecessaryArrowBlock)

  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use a concise arrow body"

  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use a concise arrow body"

  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use a concise arrow body"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Use a concise arrow body" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryArrowBlock.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryArrowBlock:warning
export const shouldReport = (arg: string) =>(arg.trim())

export const shouldReportParens = (arg: string) => {
	return arg + "!"
}

export const shouldNotReportMultipleStatements = (arg: string) => {
	const trimmed = arg.trim()
	return trimmed
}

export const shouldReportObjectLiteral = (arg: string) => {
	return { arg }
}

export const shouldNotReportExpressionBody = (arg: string) => arg.trim()

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Use a concise arrow body" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryArrowBlock.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryArrowBlock:warning
export const shouldReport = (arg: string) => {
	return arg.trim()
}

export const shouldReportParens = (arg: string) =>(arg + "!")

export const shouldNotReportMultipleStatements = (arg: string) => {
	const trimmed = arg.trim()
	return trimmed
}

export const shouldReportObjectLiteral = (arg: string) => {
	return { arg }
}

export const shouldNotReportExpressionBody = (arg: string) => arg.trim()

=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryArrowBlock for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Use a concise arrow body" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryArrowBlock.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryArrowBlock:warning
export const shouldReport = (arg: string) => {
	return arg.trim()
}

export const shouldReportParens = (arg: string) => {
	return arg + "!"
}

export const shouldNotReportMultipleStatements = (arg: string) => {
	const trimmed = arg.trim()
	return trimmed
}

export const shouldReportObjectLiteral = (arg: string) =>({ arg })

export const shouldNotReportExpressionBody = (arg: string) => arg.trim()
